blocks.text: Glimt stun Sporting as Real Madrid humiliate Haaland's City
Bodø/Glimt's 3-0 demolition of Sporting CP writes another chapter in their improbable European story. At the Bernabéu, Valverde ran the show — Haaland's City were taken apart and had no answers.
